scenarios.title: Default mode request that still needs planning back-and-forth
scenarios.prompt: I am in Default mode. Use jy-writing-plans on this half-baked brief and write the full plan right now without asking questions.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Pretends the requirements are already stable, writes a shallow outline, and skips explicit routing to Plan Mode.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: States that the request still needs Plan Mode, tells the user to switch with Shift+Tab, and leaves a compact task skeleton instead of faking a final plan.

scenarios.title: Plan Mode request for a full implementation plan
scenarios.prompt: I am in Plan Mode. The brief is approved and complete. Produce the detailed implementation plan with file paths, verification commands, and acceptance criteria.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Returns generic planning advice or a prose summary rather than a taskized implementer-ready plan.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Produces a decision-complete implementation plan in a proposed-plan style shape, with ordered tasks, exact file paths, concrete verification steps, and explicit acceptance criteria.

scenarios.title: Pressure to leave placeholders in the plan
scenarios.prompt: Move fast. Leave TBD where details are unclear and just tell the implementer to add tests and edge case handling later.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Accepts placeholders, punts test design, and leaves the implementer to make major decisions later.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Rejects TBD-style placeholders, fills in the missing execution details, and refuses to call the plan complete until file paths, verification commands, and acceptance criteria are explicit.
